item.title: Thermaltake Riing Duo 12 RGB Radiator Fan 3 Pack Dual Riing/Paquete de 3 Ventiladores para PC
item.description: Tienes Thermaltake Riing Duo 12 RGB Radiator Fan 3 Pack Dual Riing/Paquete de 3 Ventiladores para PC aqui! 🔎: Two 16.8 Million Colors LED Rings with 18 Addressable LEDsSupport TT RGB PLUS Software and TT AI Voice ControlSupport Amazon Alexa and Razer Chroma 🛒 Comprar!!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
